questions.content:
11. Local services depart from {{BLANK}} railway station.

sections.instruction: Complete the form below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Which THREE attractions can you visit at present by train from Trebirch?

questions.content: Which THREE attractions can you visit at present by train from Trebirch?
options: A. a science museum
B. a theme park
C. a climbing wall
D. a mining museum
E. an aquarium
F. a castle
G. a zoo

sections.instruction: Complete the form below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.content: Some photographs of a horse running showed
options: A. all feet off the ground
B. at least one foot on the ground
C. two feet off the ground
A. designed a system to use the technology Edison had invited
B. used available technology to make a new system
C. was already an expert in motion picture technology

questions.content: One major problem with the first system was that
options: A. only one person could be filmed
B. people could only see very short films
C. the camera was very heavy

questions.content: Rival systems started to appear in Europe after people had
options: A. been told about the American system
B. seen the American system
C. used the American system

questions.content: In 1895, a famous new system was developed by
options: A. a French team working alone
B. a Fernch and German team working together
C. a German team who invented the word ‘cinema’

questions.content: Longer filmes were not made at the time because of problems involving
options: A. the subject matters
B. the camera
C. the film projector
A. removing tension between the film reels
B. adding three more films reels to the system
C. making one of the film reels more effective

sections.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.
